Operation 'createQuote' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too brief and lacks critical details. Improved version specifies what inputs are expected (QuoteRequest schema), what outputs are returned (QuoteResponse with pricing breakdown), and clarifies that this is a non-binding operation that doesn't affect system state. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Get pricing before placing an order
data.summary_suggestion: Generate a price quote for products
data.description_suggestion: Generates a price quote for specified products and quantities before order placement. Accepts a QuoteRequest containing product SKUs, quantities, and optional customization details. Returns a QuoteResponse with itemized costs, shipping estimates, and total pricing. Quote generation does not create an order or reserve inventory.
data.reasoning: Current description is too brief and lacks critical details. Improved version specifies what inputs are expected (QuoteRequest schema), what outputs are returned (QuoteResponse with pricing breakdown), and clarifies that this is a non-binding operation that doesn't affect system state. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'listProducts' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are identical and overly generic. Improved version clarifies that results are paginated, mentions filtering/sorting capabilities, specifies the response structure, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation. This significantly improves AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of available print-on-demand products. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Returns an OrdersListResponse containing product details including SKU, name, description, pricing, and available options. Use this operation to discover products or populate product catalogs.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and overly generic. Improved version clarifies that results are paginated, mentions filtering/sorting capabilities, specifies the response structure, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation. This significantly improves AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getProduct' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description is too minimal and doesn't explain what information is returned or when an AI agent should use this operation. data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific product identified by its SKU (stock keeping unit). Returns complete product details including name, description, pricing, available sizes/colors, customization options, and production specifications. Use this operation to fetch product details before creating quotes or orders.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description is too minimal and doesn't explain what information is returned or when an AI agent should use this operation. Enhanced description provides context about response contents and use cases.

message: Operation 'getShippingInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Both summary and description are identical and lack specificity. Improved version clarifies that this operation calculates costs and options (not just retrieves static info), specifies expected inputs (recipient address and items), details the response structure (methods with costs and timeframes), and explains the operational context. This helps AI agents understand when and how to use this shipping operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Calculate shipping costs and delivery options
data.description_suggestion: Calculates shipping costs and available delivery options for specified recipient address and items. Accepts an inline request containing recipient address details and order items. Returns shipping method options with associated costs, estimated delivery timeframes, and any applicable restrictions. Use this operation to determine shipping feasibility and costs before finalizing an order.
data.reasoning: Both summary and description are identical and lack specificity. Improved version clarifies that this operation calculates costs and options (not just retrieves static info), specifies expected inputs (recipient address and items), details the response structure (methods with costs and timeframes), and explains the operational context. This helps AI agents understand when and how to use this shipping operation.

message: Operation 'createOrder' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity on what is returned and the side effect of order creation (queuing for production). Added details about request requirements, return value structure, and the state change that occurs when an order is created to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Create a new print order with recipient, items, and assets
data.description_suggestion: Create a new print order with recipient information, items to be printed, and associated assets. Requires a valid CreateOrderRequest containing recipient details, order items with product specifications, and asset URLs for printing. Returns the created Order object with a unique orderId and current order status. The order is immediately queued for production and fulfillment.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on what is returned and the side effect of order creation (queuing for production). Added details about request requirements, return value structure, and the state change that occurs when an order is created to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'listOrders' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too vague about filtering options and return structure. Added specifics about pagination, filtering capabilities, return format, and use cases to help AI agents understand what parameters to use and how to interpret results.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of orders with optional filtering and sorting capabilities. Supports filtering by order status, date range, and other criteria through query parameters. Returns an OrdersListResponse containing an array of Order objects and pagination metadata. Use this operation to retrieve order history, monitor order status, or find specific orders by applying appropriate filters.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about filtering options and return structure. Added specifics about pagination, filtering capabilities, return format, and use cases to help AI agents understand what parameters to use and how to interpret results.

message: Operation 'getOrder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description is repetitive and lacks detail about what information is returned. Added specifics about the Order object contents and practical use cases to help AI agents understand the operation's value and when to invoke it.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific order by its orderId. Returns the complete Order object including recipient information, order items, current status, costs, and fulfillment details. Use this operation to check order status, retrieve order details for customer service, or monitor production and shipping progress.
data.reasoning: Description is repetitive and lacks detail about what information is returned. Added specifics about the Order object contents and practical use cases to help AI agents understand the operation's value and when to invoke it.

message: Operation 'cancelOrder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Description is minimal and lacks critical context about state constraints, side effects, and return value. Added information about which orders can be cancelled, the return structure, and potential refund implications to help AI agents understand preconditions and consequences of this action.

data.description_suggestion: Cancel an existing order by orderId. This operation stops the order from proceeding to production and fulfillment. Only orders in certain states (e.g., pending, not yet in production) can be cancelled. Returns an OrderOutcome object indicating success or failure. Cancellation may trigger refunds depending on the order's current processing stage and payment terms.
data.reasoning: Description is minimal and lacks critical context about state constraints, side effects, and return value. Added information about which orders can be cancelled, the return structure, and potential refund implications to help AI agents understand preconditions and consequences of this action.

message: Operation 'updateOrderShipping' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is repetitive and lacks essential details about preconditions, request format, return value, and side effects. Added context about when shipping can be updated, what the request should contain, what is returned, and how it affects order cost and delivery timeline.

data.description_suggestion: Update the shipping method for an existing order by orderId. Allows changing the delivery speed or shipping option if the order has not yet been dispatched. Requires a request body specifying the new shipping method. Returns an OrderOutcome indicating whether the update succeeded. Changing shipping method may affect order cost and estimated delivery date.
data.reasoning: Description is repetitive and lacks essential details about preconditions, request format, return value, and side effects. Added context about when shipping can be updated, what the request should contain, what is returned, and how it affects order cost and delivery timeline.

data.description_suggestion: Update the recipient information for an existing order by orderId. Allows modifying delivery address and recipient details if the order has not yet been dispatched. Requires a Recipient object with updated name, address, and contact information. Returns an OrderOutcome indicating success or failure. Recipient updates may affect shipping costs and delivery feasibility.
data.reasoning: Description is minimal and lacks clarity on what can be updated, request format, return value, and implications. data.description_suggestion: Update custom metadata or internal notes for an existing order by orderId. Returns an OrderOutcome indicating whether the update succeeded. Metadata updates do not affect order processing or fulfillment.

data.current_description: Create a new print order with recipient, items, and assets
data.description_suggestion: Create a new print order with recipient information, items to be printed, and associated assets. Requires a valid CreateOrderRequest containing recipient details, order items with product specifications, and asset URLs for printing. Returns the created Order object with a unique orderId and current order status. The order is immediately queued for production and fulfillment.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on what is returned and the side effect of order creation (queuing for production). Added details about request requirements, return value structure, and the state change that occurs when an order is created to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'cancelOrder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. data.description_suggestion: Cancel an existing order by orderId. This operation stops the order from proceeding to production and fulfillment. Only orders in certain states (e.g., pending, not yet in production) can be cancelled. Returns an OrderOutcome object indicating success or failure. Cancellation may trigger refunds depending on the order's current processing stage and payment terms.
data.reasoning: Description is minimal and lacks critical context about state constraints, side effects, and return value. Added information about which orders can be cancelled, the return structure, and potential refund implications to help AI agents understand preconditions and consequences of this action.
